calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgement As To Defendant Woolrich, Inc.
Off Calendar May-25-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgement As To Defendant Woolrich, Inc. is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the motion complies with the Health & Safety Code. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/ru
